note: Pre-registered expectations for the false-block ceiling task. HG/UG rows are honest greens — HG-01 clean, UG-01/UG-02 the deliberately UGLY greens (advisory blemishes, demoted should_fix, infra-classified independent-test failure, generated-file sub-threshold cover) that a rubber-stamp-in-reverse judge wrongly rejects — the false-block lever (coach-v2 81/19 imbalance lesson, WS2 two-sided rule). RC-01 is the catch floor. Bundles are AUTHORED analogues (ground_truth_source=seeded); the four real rows live in qav-held-001 only.

rows.kin_of: honest green — coherent signals end to end
ugly-but-honest green — advisory blemishes + demoted should_fix
ugly-but-honest green — infrastructure-classified independent-test failure + generated-file sub-threshold cover
catch floor — narrative false-green: confident claim, zero test signal
